member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.ContainerCreationMode
member.summary: Container creation mode - HCS or WMI.

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest
member.summary: Request to create a new Hyper-V container.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Id
member.summary: Unique container ID (UUID or friendly name).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Name
member.summary: Container name visible in management tools.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.StorageSizeGB
member.summary: Storage size in GB (for persistent containers).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest.Mode
member.summary: Container creation mode - HCS (lightweight) or WMI (Hyper-V isolated).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode
member.summary: Tryb tworzenia VM - HCS lub WMI.

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode.HCS
member.summary: Host Compute System API (kontener-like, nie widoczny w Hyper-V Manager).

member.name: F:HyperV.Contracts.Models.VmCreationMode.WMI
member.summary: Windows Management Instrumentation API (pełna VM widoczna w Hyper-V Manager).

member.name: T:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest
member.summary: Żądanie utworzenia nowej maszyny wirtualnej Hyper-V.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Id
member.summary: Unikalny identyfikator VM (UUID lub friendly name).

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Name
member.summary: Nazwa VM widoczna w menedżerze Hyper-V.

member.name: P:HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest.Mode
member.summary: Tryb tworzenia VM - HCS (kontener-like) lub WMI (pełna VM).
